name: Lemony Radish Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the lemon juice and tamari.
2. Add the minced pepper, chives, and parsley to the bowl with the liquid mixture.
3. Pour in the salad oil and gently stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Thinly slice the radishes into matchsticks (about 1/4-inch wide).
5. Add the sliced radishes to the bowl and toss gently to coat evenly with the dressing.
6. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld together.
